raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX XXXX  billed me {$7000.00} for a {$70.00} charge XX/XX/XXXX - Dispute opened with CITI bank after XXXX XXXX told me they wouldn't be able to refund XX/XX/XXXX - Documentation sent for the first time XX/XX/XXXX - Incorrect resolution, they said I was responsible but never reviewed documentation or contacted XXXX XXXX  XX/XX/XXXX - dispute reopened XX/XX/XXXX - resent all documentation including original bill XX/XX/XXXX - sent new bill to CITI bank in which XXXX XXXX  claimed they had refunded the bank. I have not recieved a refund XX/XX/XXXX - CITI Bank withdrew the dispute, this was unauthorized XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX request to reopen dispute XX/XX/XXXX - XXXX request to reopen dispute XX/XX/XXXX - call in which CITI Bank confirmed I would receive documentation in 10 business days if the dispute is reopened
